overview: Functional medicine practice led by a board-certified PA using a systems biology approach to identify and treat root causes of chronic conditions and health concerns. Offers personalized treatment plans combining advanced testing, nutrition, and lifestyle modifications.
highlights: Board-Certified PA and Certified Functional Medicine Practitioner (IFMCP)
Specializes in hormone imbalance, gut health, chronic disease, and mental health
targetAudience: Individuals seeking to understand and address root causes of chronic health conditions through personalized functional medicine care.
